name: Asparagus with Red Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: (you might want to try Rice vinegar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the asparagus if necessary.
2. Cook the stalks in lightly salted water for 4 to 8 minutes, depending on thickness, until fork tender but still firm. Drain under cold water and set aside.
3. Broil the peppers on all sides until lightly scorched.
4. Place the cooked peppers in a paper bag for 10 minutes. Remove the peppers and peel off the skin.
5. Cut open the peppers and remove the stem, seeds, and white flesh.
6. Puree the peppers in a food processor.
7. Mix in the olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and thyme. Taste and add salt and pepper if desired.
8. Place an equal amount of the puree on 4 serving dishes. Top with equal amounts of asparagus.
Food Exchange per Serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
